item.title: What color is outer space?
item.description: StarTalk explores the question of what color outer space appears to be.

item.title: StarTalk on solar power and the future of energy
item.description: Neil deGrasse Tyson and Charles Liu discuss solar power, renewable resources, and the challenges of moving to new technology.

media:content.media:description: Neil deGrasse Tyson and Charles Liu discuss solar power, renewable resources, and the challenges of moving to new technology.

item.title: StarTalk on the appeal of ASMR

item.title: How Batteries Work, Explained by StarTalk
item.description: StarTalk breaks down the basics of how batteries work in a clear, easy-to-follow way.

item.title: StarTalk: Does cold really exist?
item.description: StarTalk explores the idea behind the phrase “cold doesn’t exist” in a simple, science-focused way.

item.title: StarTalk: Why glass blocks infrared light
item.description: StarTalk explores why transparent glass can still be opaque to infrared light.

media:content.media:description: StarTalk explores why transparent glass can still be opaque to infrared light.

item.title: StarTalk on the odds of a simulation
item.description: StarTalk explores the idea that we may be living in a simulation, and why the odds are considered low.

item.title: Comparing Intelligence Across Species
item.description: A look at how scientists study intelligence in humans and animals, and what we can infer about potential intelligence beyond Earth.
